name: Mace Consult — Demo
description: Demo workspace showcasing Paperxlip's AI workforce capabilities for programme management. Pre-populated with realistic Mace Consult issues across multiple projects and agents.

agents.name: Digital Director
agents.title: Director of Digital Delivery
agents.capabilities: Oversee all AI operations, produce executive summaries, coordinate agents, escalate to SRO, track Goldman Sachs KPIs
agents.promptContext: You are the Digital Director for Mace Consult's AI workforce. Coordinate Programme, Risk, Knowledge, Platform, and Insights agents across all projects.

agents.name: Programme Agent
agents.title: Programme Manager
agents.capabilities: Monitor milestones, identify slippage, coordinate delivery agents, manage dependencies
agents.promptContext: You are the Programme Agent for Mace Consult. Monitor milestones, identify slippage, and coordinate delivery.

agents.name: Risk Agent
agents.title: Risk & Opportunity Manager
agents.capabilities: Monitor risk registers, identify emerging risks, flag escalations, find precedent
agents.promptContext: You are the Risk Agent for Mace Consult. Monitor risk registers and surface emerging risks.

agents.name: Commercial Agent
agents.title: Commercial & Contracts Manager
agents.capabilities: Track NEC4 compensation events, draft commercial responses, monitor contract sum
agents.promptContext: You are the Commercial Agent for Mace Consult. Track compensation events and draft NEC4 responses.

agents.name: Compliance Agent
agents.title: Regulatory Compliance Officer
agents.capabilities: RIBA stage gates, CDM, Building Safety Act, ISO 19650 audit
agents.promptContext: You are the Compliance Agent for Mace Consult. Audit deliverables against RIBA, CDM, BSA, and ISO 19650.

agents.name: Knowledge Agent
agents.title: Knowledge & Document Manager
agents.capabilities: Ingest SharePoint/Dataverse documents, maintain knowledge index, answer agent queries with citations
agents.promptContext: You are the Knowledge Agent — Mace Consult's institutional memory. Ingest, index, and surface knowledge across projects.

goals.title: Digital Delivery Excellence
goals.description: Deliver predictability, automation, and control across all Mace Consult projects

children.title: Risk Synthesis
children.description: Proactively identify risks with cross-project precedent

children.title: Commercial Control
children.description: Track all NEC4 compensation events and variations

children.title: Regulatory Compliance
children.description: Zero compliance gaps across RIBA, CDM, BSA, ISO 19650

projects.name: NHP — New Hospital Programme
projects.description: NHS New Hospital Programme. Mace Consult acting as programme manager. Key workstreams: design management, procurement strategy, digital integration, stakeholder engagement.

projects.name: MWCC Migration
projects.description: Mace Way Control Centre migration from legacy SharePoint to new Power Platform environment (CONSULT-MWCC-INTERNAL-01-DEV → UAT → PROD). Includes document validation via MaceStyle.

projects.name: ISO 19650 Compliance Rollout
projects.description: Roll out ISO 19650 information management standards across all Mace Consult projects. Includes CDE setup, naming conventions, and staff training.

issues.title: Review NHP RIBA Stage 2 deliverables against CDM requirements
issues.description: RIBA Stage 2 design package received from architect. Compliance Agent to review against CDM 2015 regulations and Building Safety Act 2022 gateway requirements before client sign-off.

issues.title: Raise Early Warning Notice — ground investigation delay
issues.description: Ground investigation contractor has indicated 3-week delay due to equipment availability. NEC4 clause 16 early warning notice required. Commercial Agent to draft and issue within 24 hours.

issues.title: Update risk register — contractor financial exposure (CE #047)
issues.description: Compensation Event #047 (ground investigation delay) has an estimated £340,000 cost exposure. Risk register to be updated with revised likelihood and impact scoring.

issues.title: Produce Week 24 programme report for client SRO
issues.description: Weekly programme summary with RAG status for each workstream. Distributed to NHS England SRO and Mace Consult leadership. Includes milestone tracker and critical path update.

issues.title: Ingest updated NHP design register from SharePoint
issues.description: New design documents uploaded to SharePoint (09 Design library). Knowledge Agent to ingest and index 23 new documents for cross-project search.

issues.title: Validate MWCC document naming conventions against ISO 19650-2
issues.description: MaceStyle validator flagged 47 documents with incorrect naming conventions in the MWCC UAT environment. Compliance Agent to review flagged documents and produce remediation plan.

issues.title: Configure Dataverse security roles for MWCC PROD environment
issues.description: PROD environment (CONSULT-MWCC-INTERNAL-03-PROD) requires security role assignment for Anjaly Suresh, Adem Mehmet, and Stephen Cummins. Service account SACONSULTPPMWCC to be granted appropriate permissions.

issues.title: Draft ISO 19650 training materials for NHP project team
issues.description: 60-person NHP project team requires ISO 19650 induction. Knowledge Agent to produce training deck and FAQ document drawing on existing knowledge base.

issues.title: Audit NHP CDE document status codes — S1-S4 compliance check
issues.description: Quarterly audit of NHP SharePoint CDE. Check all documents in SHARED and PUBLISHED libraries have correct suitability codes (S1-S4, A, B, CR) and are not stale.

issues.title: Synthesise risk precedent: ground conditions across Mace portfolio
issues.description: Query Mace Context knowledge base for ground condition risks on comparable projects. Produce precedent summary with mitigation strategies that have worked previously.

issues.title: Compensation Event #047 — cost assessment submission
issues.description: CE #047 cost assessment blocked pending receipt of ground investigation contractor's quotation. Commercial Agent to chase quotation and escalate if not received by end of week.

issues.title: Set up weekly automated programme digest
issues.description: Configure n8n workflow to trigger Programme Agent heartbeat every Monday 07:00. Agent to produce and email programme digest to distribution list before 09:00 stand-up.
